timeline.text:
Embracing Unity in Aviation: Air Peace and United Nigeria Airlines

At United Nigeria Airlines, we believe in the power of unity and collaboration within the aviation industry. We are honored by the kind words of Air Peace Chairman, Barr. Allen Onyema, encouraging travelers to experience our service. His endorsement is a testament to the spirit of camaraderie that defines our industry.

We believe that collaboration drives us all to excel, pushing boundaries and setting new standards for customer satisfaction and safety. Whether you choose Air Peace or United Nigeria Airlines, rest assured that your journey is in capable hands. 

Thank you, Chairman Onyema, for highlighting the importance of unity in our industry. #UnitedWithPeace 

#FlyUnitedNigeriaAirlines #FlyingToUnite #UnityInAviation #CustomerSatisfaction #SamsungUnpacked #flywithus✈️

📹 @leonphotographyng

timeline.text:
Mama Ruth 🤍🤍

Living clay, blessed with air
Peace there is, here to stay
Black and brown skin,  bright and fair 
Heavenly son,  man like Jesse

In the timeline full of pain
Spread the love to one, non-restrain
With you wand, change the stage
And see the bounty full image

I will speak to one in tears
Finding succour all alone
Speaking mirrors sink his fears
Till he sits again in his throne

Todays life known to all
Tomorrows future, none knows the truth
Till we meet again, beyond the call
Rest in peace Mama Ruth 🥺🥺🕊🕊🤍

quoted.text:
In hushed whispers, the wind sighs low, a gentle balm on worries that grow.
May peace, my bro Ose, a boundless sea, wash over you eternally.

Like sunlight warm on a tranquil shore, may calmness settle deep to the core.
No storm shall rage, no shadows creep, just endless solace,

timeline.text: This has Air Peace written all over it. I had an hour's flight booked for 4 pm. I didn't get to Nigeria until past 5 am.

quoted.text:
You can book a flight for noon and end up traveling by midnight without any compensation.

What’s peaceful about that?
